query:
-- Jacob Misiorowski (MIL, home, gameId=2250008): consensus line o/u 6.5, best odds o+125 / u-145
UPDATE mlb_strikeout_props SET
  bookLine = '6.5',
  bookOverOdds = '+125',
  bookUnderOdds = '-145',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE gameId = 2250008 AND side = 'home';

-- Matthew Boyd (CHC, home, gameId=2250009): consensus line o/u 5.5, best odds o+113 / u-148
UPDATE mlb_strikeout_props SET
  bookLine = '5.5',
  bookOverOdds = '+113',
  bookUnderOdds = '-148',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE gameId = 2250009 AND side = 'home';
